settings.heading: Order Trophies & Medals in Bulk Across India
settings.subheading: From 50 to 5,000+ pieces — bulk trophies, medals, shields and mementos with volume pricing, GST invoicing, custom engraving and reliable pan-India delivery. One contact, one quote, one dispatch.
settings.features_heading: Why teams order bulk from Meru Trophy

settings.label: Quick answer
settings.text: Meru Trophy handles bulk trophy and medal orders from 50 to 5,000+ pieces with volume discounts, free engraving/logo printing, GST invoices and pan-India delivery. Medals start from ₹25/piece in bulk and trophies from ₹150. Share your quantity, material and event date on WhatsApp (+91 78922 07252) for a same-day quote.

settings.heading: Built for high-volume events
settings.text: Sports days, marathons, college fests, corporate recognition programmes and government events all need awards by the hundred — consistent, on-brand and on time. With 20+ years and our own Bangalore workshop (laser engraving, UV printing, plating and QC in-house), we produce large runs without the quality drift you get from resellers. You get one project owner, transparent per-piece pricing, and a single tracked dispatch.

settings.title: Volume pricing
settings.text: Per-piece rates step down at 50, 100, 500 and 1,000+ units.

settings.title: In-house production
settings.text: Engraving, UV printing, plating and QC under one roof for consistency at scale.

settings.title: GST & PO friendly
settings.text: Proper GST invoices, PO-based orders and tender-style documentation for institutions.

settings.title: Pan-India dispatch
settings.text: Bulk-packed, cushioned and tracked to any city, with rush options for tight dates.

settings.title: Send your requirement
settings.text: Quantity, item type, material, engraving text and event date.

settings.title: Get a volume quote
settings.text: We send per-piece pricing, design options and a timeline — usually same day.

settings.title: Approve proof & advance
settings.text: Sign off a mockup; 50% advance via UPI/transfer/card with GST invoice.

settings.title: Produced & dispatched
settings.text: Made in our workshop, QC'd, bulk-packed and tracked to your venue.

settings.question: What is the minimum quantity for bulk pricing?
settings.answer: Volume pricing typically begins at 50 pieces and improves at 100, 500 and 1,000+. Smaller mixed orders are welcome too — just ask for a quote.

settings.question: Can every piece be engraved differently?
settings.answer: Yes. We handle individual recipient names from a spreadsheet, as well as a single common engraving repeated across the run — whichever you need.

settings.question: Do you provide GST invoices and accept POs?
settings.answer: Yes — GST invoices on all B2B orders, plus PO-based ordering and documentation suited to schools, colleges, PSUs and corporates.

settings.question: How fast can a large bulk order be delivered?
settings.answer: Typical bulk runs ship in 5–10 business days after proof approval depending on quantity and customisation. For urgent events, WhatsApp us — we regularly expedite sports-day and fest orders.

settings.heading: Need awards by the hundred?
settings.text: Send your quantity and event date for same-day bulk pricing with GST invoice.
